summary: Plan-only remediation assessment. No PR has complete merge preflight proof. #82955 has a bounded maintainer-safe contributor-branch repair path; #54716, #62682, #93402, and #93686 need maintainer judgment or fresher review details before merge or repair finalization.

actions.reason: Repair the contributor branch, re-run focused installer validation plus pnpm check:changed, run Codex /review, and only then reconsider merge.
Maintainer should decide whether to request author follow-up, refresh the proof, or schedule a narrower repair job once review-bot findings are hydrated.
The broad code delta and auth-provider risk match the job's require_human_for broad_code_delta gate; maintainer review is required before repair or merge.
Active review-thread context and a failing check block merge preflight; maintainer should resolve whether the review comments are blocking or informational.
Author-follow-up status and failing lint/type checks block merge; maintainer should decide whether Clownfish may take over the branch repair.
Build a repair-contributor-branch artifact for #82955; do not open a replacement PR unless branch repair proves impossible.

needs_human: #54716: failing behavior proof plus unresolved Codex review-bot comments without actionable hydrated details.
#62682: broad size-L auth-provider/runtime change requires maintainer judgment.
#93402: active review-thread context is present but not hydrated enough to prove resolution.
#93686: status waiting on author plus failing lint/type checks requires maintainer decision before Clownfish takes over.
